description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of light wood and white exterior finishes. The front area includes a paved patio, a prominent glass door, and a flagpole with a blue and yellow flag. Tall, slender trees line one side of the property, providing a natural privacy screen. The house has large windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. A detached garage or storage structure is visible, along with a hot tub or small pool in the yard. The overall layout is open and functional, with clear zones for living, recreation, and parking.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with light wood and white finishes, large windows, a patio, and a detached garage, surrounded by tall trees and a hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass doors, flagpole, and three tall trees to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of five tall trees, the main building's length, and the detached garage at the back.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the hot tub, patio area, and open access to the interior living space.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the garage structure, four tall trees, and the rear facade of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, wide steps, and a paved patio with minimalistic design elements.
